After 30 days, personal data is removed and those credentials can be used again.

welcome.phraseEveryRight: Dominate the pitch, one answer at a time.
welcome.categoriesSubtitle: Test your knowledge across {count} World Cup categories
welcome.tierRoadSubtitle: Begin at Academy and work your way to GOAT.
welcome.leaderboardSubtitle: Join the table, earn rank points, and chase the top spots.
welcome.wcPromoDescription: Play ranked matches, climb the leaderboard, and win prizes. Only 3 ranked matches per day — every game counts.
welcome.wcPromoMerch: Top 25 players win exclusive Betsson Sport merch — cap, t-shirt & football
welcome.wcPromoRulesDescription: World Cup event rules and prizes
welcome.wcPromoRulesDurationText: The World Cup Event runs from June 11 until July 19. During this period, players compete on a dedicated leaderboard by earning Ranked Points (RP) through Ranked Matches. At the end of the event, players with the highest Ranked Point totals will receive prizes.
welcome.wcPromoRulesTicketsText: Each player receives 5 free Ranked Tickets per day. Up to 5 additional Ranked Tickets can be purchased from the Store each day.
welcome.wcPromoRulesForfeitEarlyTitle: If a player leaves during the first 2 rounds, the match is cancelled as a no-contest:
welcome.wcPromoRulesForfeitEarlyNo1: Neither player gains or loses Ranked Points
welcome.wcPromoRulesForfeitEarlyNo2: Neither player's Ranked Ticket is consumed (both refunded)
welcome.wcPromoRulesForfeitLateTitle: If a player leaves after the first 2 rounds, it counts as a forfeit:
welcome.wcPromoRulesForfeitLateNo1: The player who left loses Ranked Points (−50 RP)
welcome.wcPromoRulesForfeitLateNo2: The opponent wins the match and gains Ranked Points (+50 RP)
welcome.wcPromoRulesForfeitLateNo3: Both players' Ranked Tickets are consumed
welcome.wcPromoRulesTicketsForfeitWhy: This rule exists to prevent players from gaining unfair advantages due to immediate disconnects or accidental forfeits, while still discouraging players from quitting a match in progress.
welcome.wcPromoRulesMarginText: The bonus is based on the difference between rounds won by each player.
welcome.wcPromoRulesStrengthText: A stronger player is defined as a player who is at least one Ranked Tier above you.
welcome.wcPromoRulesStrengthEx2: Rotation Player defeats World Class Player → +10 RP
welcome.wcPromoRulesFairText: To ensure fair competition, QuizBall reserves the right to manually review leaderboard results before prizes are awarded.
welcome.wcPromoRulesFairWarn: Players found violating the spirit of fair competition may be removed from the leaderboard and become ineligible for prizes.
welcome.wcPromoRulesFooter: Every match matters. Climb the leaderboard, prove your football knowledge, and compete for real prizes in the QuizBall World Cup Event powered by Betsson Sport.
welcome.footerLegal: QuizBall is an independent football trivia game. Club, league, tournament, and player references are used for editorial identification only. QuizBall is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any club, league, federation, or competition organizer.
welcome.allCategoriesDescription: Explore the full QuizBall category list.

announcements.rpRebalanceBody:
Friends, after the World Cup event started we discovered a minor bug in the Ranked points system. Specifically, during Placement matches (first 3 matches) players were receiving more points than intended.

The bug has been fully fixed and the Ranked points system now works as originally designed.

Because of this, some players' ratings and Ranked points have been automatically corrected based on their win/loss history to keep the leaderboard fair and accurate for all participants.

We apologize for any inconvenience. 🙏

The updated Ranked points system and rules can be found in the Rules section on the leaderboard page.

Good luck in the World Cup event! 🏆⚽
